# Define a new MLIR library named 'AffineFullUnroll'.
# This macro handles setting up the library target with proper MLIR conventions.
add_mlir_library(AffineFullUnroll
    # List of C++ source files to compile into this library.
    AffineFullUnroll.cpp
    AffineFullUnrollPatternRewrite.cpp

    # 'DEPENDS' ensures that the specified TableGen targets are built 
    # BEFORE this library starts compiling. This is critical because 
    # the C++ code includes the '.h.inc' files generated by TableGen.
    DEPENDS
    MLIRAffineFullUnrollPasses # Defined below.
)

# --- TableGen Configuration ---

# Set the input TableGen file for the following 'mlir_tablegen' calls.
set(LLVM_TARGET_DEFINITIONS Passes.td)

# Run 'mlir-tblgen' to generate 'Passes.h.inc'.
# '-gen-pass-decls' tells it to generate C++ declarations for the passes defined in 'Passes.td'.
# '-name Affine' sets the group name for these passes.
mlir_tablegen(Passes.h.inc -gen-pass-decls -name Affine)

# Create a CMake target for the generated TableGen files.
# This allows 'add_mlir_library' (and other targets) to depend on it via 'DEPENDS'.
add_public_tablegen_target(MLIRAffineFullUnrollPasses)

# Generate documentation for the passes in Markdown format.
# This processes 'Passes.td' and creates documentation based on the pass definitions.
add_mlir_doc(Passes AffinePasses ./ -gen-pass-doc)
